rationale: Rule governs department property acquisition/disposition and foreclosure sales. It references ad valorem taxes only to require finding taxpaying purchasers. No interaction with homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: the department shall make a diligent effort to sell a housing development acquired through foreclosure to a purchaser who will be required to pay ad valorem taxes on the housing development
_note: No conflict identified. Rule concerns department property management, not homestead exemption levels.
